zh.lifeSummary: 當John Webster I於1485年5月14日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾希斯頓時，他的父親William Webster Sr.25歲，母親Agnes Monteith Erskine23歲。他於1508年與Lady Emma Wallis在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1524年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特被列為butcher。他去世於1554年8月在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Webster I于1485年5月14日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾希斯頓时，他的父亲William Webster Sr.25岁，母亲Agnes Monteith Erskine23岁。他于1508年与Lady Emma Wallis在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1524年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特被列为butcher。他去世于1554年8月在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Webster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webbester ‘weaver’ (Old English webbestre ‘female weaver’). By the time of surname formation, the gender distinction of the -stre suffix had almost completely disappeared. Compare Webb , Webber , and Weaver .

History: The name Webster was brought to North America from England independently by several different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One John Webster settled in Ipswich, MA, in 1635; another John Webster (died 1661), ancestor of the lexicographer Noah Webster, emigrated to Cambridge, MA, c. 1631 and later became one of the founders of the colony of CT, of which he was appointed governor in 1656. Daniel Webster (1782–1852), politician and orator, was born in Salisbury, NH, a descendant of Thomas Webster, a prominent 17th-century citizen of Ipswich, MA, whose family had settled there around 1635, while he was still a child.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Webster I was born on 14 May 1485, in Syston, Leicestershire, England, his father, William Webster Sr., was 25 and his mother, Agnes Monteith Erskine, was 23. He married Lady Emma Wallis in 1508, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. In 1524, his occupation is listed as butcher in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. He died in August 1554, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Webster I est né le 14 mai 1485, à Syston, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Webster Sr., avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Monteith Erskine, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Emma Wallis en 1508, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. En 1524, sa profession de son indiquée est butcher à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en août 1554, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Webster I am 14. Mai 1485 in Syston, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Webster Sr. 25 und seine Mutter Agnes Monteith Erskine 23. Er hat 1508 in Cossington, Leicestershire, England Lady Emma Wallis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1524 ist sein Beruf als butcher in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb im August 1554 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Cossington, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Webster I è nato il il 14 maggio 1485 nel Syston, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William Webster Sr., aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Monteith Erskine, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Emma Wallis nel 1508, nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Nel 1524, la sua occupazione è indicata come butcher nel Leicester, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel agosto 1554, nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Webster Iが1485年5月14日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアシストンで生まれた時，父William Webster Sr.は25歳，母Agnes Monteith Erskineは23歳であった。1508年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンでLady Emma Wallisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1524年，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターでの職業はbutcherと記録されている。彼は1554年8月にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Webster I(이)가 1485년 5월 14일 영국 레이스스터실르 시스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Webster Sr.(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Monteith Erskine(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1508년 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 Lady Emma Wallis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1524년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 butcher이었다. 그는 1554년 8월 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Webster I nasceu em 14 de maio de 1485, em Syston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Webster Sr., tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Monteith Erskine, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Emma Wallis em 1508, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1524, sua profissão aparece como butcher em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1554, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Webster I родился 14 мая 1485 г. в местности систон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Webster Sr. было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Monteith Erskine, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Emma Wallis в 1508 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1524 году он работал по профессии butcher в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер август 1554 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.1524-1540: mai le 1524 e o'o I le 1540

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Webster I nació el 14 de mayo de 1485, en Syston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Webster Sr., tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes Monteith Erskine, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Emma Wallis en 1508, en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1524, su ocupación registrada era butcher en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en agosto de 1554, en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
